name: Black Magic Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch round baking pans or one 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, stir together sugar, flour, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add eggs, buttermilk, coffee, oil, and vanilla; beat on medium speed of electric mixer for 2 minutes (batter will be thin).
5. Pour batter into prepared pans.
6. Bake 30 to 35 minutes for round pans, or 35 to 40 minutes for rectangular pan, until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool pans for 10 minutes, then remove cakes to wire racks. Cool completely.
8. Frost as desired. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
To make sour milk: Use 1 tablespoon white vinegar plus milk to equal 1 cup. Hershey's is a registered trademark of Hershey Foods Corporation.
